nta.declaration: clock cl; int temp; const int a = 2010; const int b = 2027; const int c = 2045; const int d = 2063; const int e = 2081; const int f = 2100; const int g = 2118; const int h = 2136; const int i = 2154; const int j = 2178; const int k = 2209; const int l = 2242; const int m = 2268; const int n = 2286; const int o = 2304; const int p = 2322; const int q = 2341; const int r = 2359;
